<onlyinclude><templatestyles src="Upgrade_Infobox/styles.css" /><infobox theme="upgrade-infobox">
    <title source="Name">
        <format><center>'''{{{Name}}}'''{{#if: {{{Rarity|}}} | <br/><span class="rarity-{{{Rarity}}}" style="font-size: 0.7em; font-weight: normal;">{{{Rarity}}}</span>}}</format>
    </title>
    <image source="icon">
        <format>[[File:{{{icon}}}|center|alt=Icon of {{{Name}}}]]</format>
    </image>
    <panel>
        <data source="ApplicableTo">
            <label>Applicable To</label>
            <format>{{{ApplicableTo}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="EffectType">
            <label>Effect Type</label>
            <format>{{{EffectType}}}</format>
        </data>
        <data source="UpgradeType">
            <label>Upgrade Type</label>
            <format>{{{UpgradeType}}}</format>
        </data>{{#if: {{{pattern|}}} |
        <section>
            <header>Pattern</header>
            <data source="pattern">
                <format>[[File:{{{pattern}}}|frameless|x400px|center|alt=Upgrade pattern for {{{Name}}}]]</format>
            </data>
        </section>}}
        <section>
            <header>{{#if: {{{UnlockCost1_Resource|}}}{{{UnlockCost2_Resource|}}}{{{UnlockCost3_Resource|}}}{{{UnlockCost4_Resource|}}}{{{UnlockCost5_Resource|}}} | Unlock Cost }}</header>
            <data source="UnlockCost1_Resource">
                <label>{{{UnlockCost1_Resource|}}}</label>
                <format>{{{UnlockCost1_Count|}}}</format>
            </data>
            <data source="UnlockCost2_Resource">
                <label>{{{UnlockCost2_Resource|}}}</label>
                <format>{{{UnlockCost2_Count|}}}</format>
            </data>
            <data source="UnlockCost3_Resource">
                <label>{{{UnlockCost3_Resource|}}}</label>
                <format>{{{UnlockCost3_Count|}}}</format>
            </data>
            <data source="UnlockCost4_Resource">
                <label>{{{UnlockCost4_Resource|}}}</label>
                <format>{{{UnlockCost4_Count|}}}</format>
            </data>
            <data source="UnlockCost5_Resource">
                <label>{{{UnlockCost5_Resource|}}}</label>
                <format>{{{UnlockCost5_Count|}}}</format>
            </data>
        </section>{{#if: {{{APIName|}}} |
        <section collapse="closed">
            <header>Technical Information</header>
            <data source="APIName">
                <label>API Name</label>
                <format><code>{{{APIName}}}</code></format>
            </data>{{#if: {{{Flags|}}} |
            <data source="Flags">
                <label>Flags</label>
                <format>{{{Flags}}}</format>
            </data>}}
        </section>}}
    </panel>
</infobox></onlyinclude> 
==Documentation==
This template is to display upgrades.

==How to Use==
<pre>
{{Upgrade Infobox
|Name = Name of the upgrade
|Rarity = Rarity of the upgrade
|EffectType = Effect type (Normal, Fire, etc.)
|UpgradeType = Upgrade type (Normal, Cosmetic, etc.)
|icon = Icon image
|pattern = Pattern image
|UnlockCostX_Resource = Resource name
|UnlockCostX_Count = Resource count
|ID = ID of the upgrade
|APIName = API name of the upgrade
|Flags = Flags of the upgrade
|ApplicableTo = Applicable to (e.g. "Fast Shotgun, Fast Reload Shotgun")
}}
</pre>

==Example Usage==

<pre>
{{Upgrade Infobox
|Name = Extralight Frame
|Rarity = Epic
|EffectType = Normal
|UpgradeType = Normal
|Description = Fire while sprinting.
|icon = Extralight_Frame_icon.png
|pattern = Extralight_Frame_pattern.svg
|UnlockCost1_Resource = Gats
|UnlockCost1_Count = 130
|UnlockCost2_Resource = Romphus
|UnlockCost2_Count = 20
|UnlockCost3_Resource = Gussula
|UnlockCost3_Count = 3
|UnlockCost4_Resource = Beezia
|UnlockCost4_Count = 14
|ID = 40986
|APIName = Extralight Frame
|Flags = NoRandom
|ApplicableTo = SMG
}}
</pre>
===Result===
{{Upgrade Infobox
|Name = Extralight Frame
|Rarity = Epic
|EffectType = Normal
|UpgradeType = Normal
|Description = Fire while sprinting.
|icon = Extralight_Frame_icon.png
|pattern = Extralight_Frame_pattern.svg
|UnlockCost1_Resource = Gats
|UnlockCost1_Count = 130
|UnlockCost2_Resource = Romphus
|UnlockCost2_Count = 20
|UnlockCost3_Resource = Gussula
|UnlockCost3_Count = 3
|UnlockCost4_Resource = Beezia
|UnlockCost4_Count = 14
|ID = 40986
|APIName = Extralight Frame
|Flags = NoRandom
|ApplicableTo = SMG
}}

[[Category:Templates]]
